policy: Sound cues are low-level comprehension bookmarks. They must not mask voiceover, English terms, formulas, or captions.

cues.clarity_rule: Opening sonic logo before the hook phrase; remove if it masks Transformer or Attention.
Projection split cue after the scene turns to W Q, W K, W V cards.
Formula reveal cue after the phrase 核心公式, not over Attention.
Parallel-head lane cue; keep subdued and non-game-like.
Concat to W O merge cue; do not cover Concat or W O pronunciation.
Dimension split cue after d k, d v, d model phrase.
Paper Figure 2 source spotlight; keep academic and low.
Engineering boundary cue must not cover MQA, GQA, FlashAttention, or MoE.
CTA tail under the Position Encoding teaser only.
